name: AgriNexus Native Voice Bridge
purpose: Contract for Android, iOS, and desktop shells that wrap the AgriNexus web platform with deeper device permissions.

wakeRuntime.browserMode: Tap microphone once, then Hey AgriNexus/Nexus/Agri can route commands while the browser allows listening.
wakeRuntime.nativeMode: Use OS-approved foreground service, app audio session, or desktop companion for wake detection, with visible privacy indicator and a one-tap off switch.
wakeRuntime.desktopMode: Use the visible native desktop companion for computer-wide wake listening when Chrome is closed. The listener owns OS microphone permission and hands commands to the hosted AgriNexus API.
wakeRuntime.privacyRule: Never run hidden listening. Show status, allow pause, and keep audit records for wake, transcript, command, and stop events.

nativeWakeGate.forwardingRule: Native shells forward a transcript only when it includes a wake phrase or follows a wake phrase inside the follow-up window.
nativeWakeGate.confusionRule: If speech is unclear, overlapping, or below confidence threshold, send a clarify event instead of executing a workflow.

commandEnvelope.command: string user's phrase or typed request

attachments.url: native secure file URL or uploaded URL
attachments.caption: optional

commandEnvelope.requiresConfirmation: boolean for health, payment, buyer contact, provider contact, route change, or job application

webCallbacks.onLocation: window.AgriNexusNativeBridge.receive({ type: 'location.route_update', latitude, longitude, speed, heading })

desktopRuntime.wakeBehavior: Wake phrase opens the hosted app and routes command text to /api/agent/command with inputMode=native.
desktopRuntime.browserIndependence: Does not depend on Chrome microphone permission or the page being open.

nativePermissionSession.readyState: native-always-on-ready when microphone, background audio, and always-on wake mode are active.

realtimeVoiceStreaming.transport: WebRTC SDP offer from browser or native WebView; server negotiates with OpenAI using server-side credentials.
fallbacks: native speech recognition and native TTS
browser speech recognition and browser speech synthesis
realtimeVoiceStreaming.interruptRule: User speech, Nexus stop, wake phrase correction, or native voice.interrupt immediately stops playback before the next turn.

communicationsExecution.confirmationRule: Ask Nexus must confirm before a real call, SMS, or WhatsApp delivery.

offlineQueue.conflictRule: If an offline command affects health, payment, buyer contact, provider contact, or job application, ask the user to confirm again before live sync.

telehealth: Nexus, attach a video for the provider

productionNotes: Browser mode can listen only while permission and tab focus allow it.
Native mode can request OS-level microphone, notification, GPS, camera, and background task permissions.
Desktop companion mode can listen while Chrome is closed because it uses operating-system microphone permission instead of browser microphone permission.
Always-on wake should be implemented with an OS-approved wake/listening flow and clear privacy controls.
The web app should remain fully functional without native mode; native mode adds deeper permissions rather than replacing core workflows.
Every native command must still pass through AgriNexus confirmation gates for sensitive actions.
